reviews.comment:
Los fines de semana Tienen un sólo playero, entonces cierran una isla y trabaja con dos surtidores, la cola se hace en la ruta y banquina, es bastante peligroso, es la única estación de la zona asique a esperar nomás

(Translated by Google)
On weekends they only have one attendant, so they close one island and operate with two pumps. The line forms on the road and shoulder; it's quite dangerous. It's the only station in the area, so you just have to wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURScGVMc1VREAE
